title: IFF to Release First Quarter 2023 Results May 8
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IFF--IFF (NYSE:IFF) today announced that it will release its first quarter 2023 earnings results following the market close on Monday, May 8, 2023. The management team will host a live webcast on Tuesday, May 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss results and outlook with the investor community. Investors may access the live webcast and accompanying slide presentation on the Company's website at ir.iff.com. For those unable to listen to the live webcast, a recorded version wil.
